cases.notes: Exact fresh approval, healthy robot, identical safe preview, Nav2 success, and stopped postcondition.
No ROS adapter or motion action may start.
The invocation hash differs from the Registry approval.
A path or semantic-map hash change blocks motion before NavigateToPose.
The accepted goal is canceled and cannot auto-retry.
Timeout, Keepout entry, goal error, or nonzero final velocity fails closed.
